allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update free tier to 5-minute checks, add 1-minute to Nano

- Free tier now has 5-minute check intervals \(was 1-minute\)
- Nano plan now includes 1-minute check intervals as a feature
- Updated pricing page, compare page, homepage, and all product pages
- Updated metadata and SEO descriptions across the site

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update pricing tiers: replace custom branding with status page builder

- Free tier: add one status page
- Nano tier: replace custom domain/branding with unlimited status pages and drag & drop builder
- Status pages: add drag & drop builder feature, remove custom domain/branding references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add YouTube video component to status-pages and alerting pages

- Create reusable YouTubeVideo component with privacy-enhanced embed
- Add optional video prop to ProductPage for embedding tutorial videos
- Add status page creation video to /status-pages
- Add alerting setup video to /alerting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
